event: General Meng Ao suppressed rebellion in Jinyang
Meng Ao attacked Han, took 13 cities; Wang Yi died
Meng Ao attacked Wei, took 20 cities; established Dong Commandery
Comet appeared in east, north, and west; General Meng Ao died
Lao Ai rebellion suppressed; Lao Ai executed
Wang Jian, Huan Yi, Yang Duanhe attacked Ye, took 9 cities
Huan Yi attacked Pingyang, killed Zhao general Hu Zhe, beheaded 100,000
Internal Shi Teng attacked Han, captured King An of Han; established Yingchuan Commandery - HAN CONQUERED
Wang Jian and Qiang Hui conquered Zhao, captured Zhao King - ZHAO CONQUERED
Jing Ke assassination attempt failed; Wang Jian attacked Yan
Wang Ben took Yan capital Ji, obtained Crown Prince Dan's head
Wang Ben flooded Daliang with Yellow River water; Wei King surrendered - WEI CONQUERED
Wang Jian and Meng Wu conquered Chu, captured Chu King; Xiang Yan committed suicide - CHU CONQUERED
Wang Ben captured Yan King Xi and Dai King Jia; Wang Jian conquered Jiangnan - YAN AND DAI CONQUERED
Wang Ben attacked Qi from Yan, captured King Jian of Qi - QI CONQUERED, QIN UNIFIED CHINA
